NIT Jamshedpur – Admission, Cutoff, Fees & Placements 2026

Engineering Colleges, NIT Colleges

Overview

Institute NameNational Institute of Technology, Jamshedpur
Also Known AsNITJSR
Institute TypeGovernment
Established1960
LocationJamshedpur, Jharkhand

NIT Jamshedpur: Admission | Ranking | Fees

Also Known as

Also known as NIT Adityapur, NIT Jamshedpur and NIT JSR.

ADDRESS

National Institute of Technology, P.O. RIT Jamshedpur, Jharkhand - 831014

Nearest Airport and Railway Station

Birsa Munda Airport, Ranchi
130 km
Tatanagar Junction Railway Station
10 km

CAMPUS FACILITIES

RANKING

BodyCategoryRank (Year)
LatestPrevious
National Ranking
NIRF Engineering Rankings82 (2025)101-150 (2024)
The Week Best Technical Universities India29 (2023)--

MODE OF ADMISSION

  • Candidates must appear for the JEE (Main) exam and either secure at least 75% marks (65% for SC/ST/PwD) in Class XII or be within the category-wise top 20 percentile in their respective Class XII board examination. For more details, refer to the JEE Main Performance Criteria in Class XII.
  • Admissions are based on the rank obtained in JEE (Main) through JoSAA Counselling and CSAB Special Round.

COURSES OFFERED

Please choose the course.

B.E./B.Tech. - 4 Years

  • Civil Engineering
  • Computer Science and Engineering
  • Electrical Engineering
  • Electronics and Communication Engineering
  • Engineering and Computational Mechanics
  • Mechanical Engineering
  • Metallurgical and Materials Engineering
  • Production and Industrial Engineering

FEE STRUCTURE

Institute Fee

ParticularsAmount
Caution Money (One-Time, Refundable)₹10,000
One-Time Fees₹22,000
Tuition Fee (per Semester)₹62,500
Other Fees (per Semester)₹12,000
Total₹1,06,500

Hostel Fee

ParticularsAmount
Hostel Seat Rent (per Semester)₹6,000
Electricity & Water Charges (per Semester)₹2,000
Other Fees (per Semester)₹7,000
Mess Advance (per Semester)₹18,000
Total₹33,000

Fee Waivers

  • 100% Tuition Fee waiver for SC/ST/PwD students.
  • 100% Tuition Fee remission for Most Economically Backward students with family income less than ₹1 lakh per annum.
  • 2/3rd Tuition Fee remission for Other Economically Backward students with family income between ₹1 lakh to ₹5 lakh per annum.

PLACEMENTS

  • 2024
  • Older
